# Coding plan

Updated at: 2026-04-23 14:33:49

Copy as MD

[Product](https://www.alibabacloud.com/product/modelstudio)

Coding Plan provides access to top-tier models such as Qwen, GLM, Kimi, and MiniMax through mainstream AI coding tools. With a fixed monthly fee, it offers a cost-effective and predictable alternative to standard pay-as-you-go API calls and prevents overdue payments.

## **Plan details**

**Note**

1.   As of March 20, 2026, 00:00:00 (UTC+08:00), the Lite plan is no longer available for new subscriptions (see [announcement](https://www.alibabacloud.com/zh/notice/detail?_p_lc=1&id=1781)). As of April 13, 2026, 18:00:00 (UTC+08:00), renewals and upgrades for the Lite plan have been discontinued (see [announcement](https://www.alibabacloud.com/zh/notice/detail?_p_lc=1&id=1837)).

2.   The Lite plan supports all plan models, including Qwen, GLM, Kimi, and MiniMax, same as the Pro plan.

**Pro**

**Pro**
Supported models Recommended models: **qwen3.6-plus** (vision), **kimi-k2.5** (vision), **glm-5**, and **MiniMax-M2.5**

More models: `qwen3.5-plus` (vision)**,**`qwen3-max-2026-01-23`, `qwen3-coder-next`, `qwen3-coder-plus`, and `glm-4.7`
Price**$ 50**/month
Quota*   **6,000**requests per 5 hours

*   **45,000**requests per week

*   **90,000**requests per month

*   **Limited availability**: Slots are limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis. New slots are restocked daily at 00:00:00 (UTC+08:00). Go to the [Coding Plan page](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=coding-plan#/efm/coding-plan-index) to subscribe.

*   **Quota consumption:** Each query consumes quota according to the number of model calls. Simple tasks typically use 5–10 calls, while complex tasks may use 10–30 or more. Actual consumption varies based on task complexity, context, and tool usage. You can check your usage on the [Coding Plan page](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=globalset#/efm/coding_plan).

*   **Quota replenishment**:

    1.   5-hour quota: This quota operates on a rolling basis. Quota is automatically replenished for usage from 5 hours prior. For example, if you use 100 calls at 10:00 and 200 calls at 11:00, the 100 calls are restored at 15:00, and the 200 calls are restored at 16:00.

    2.   Weekly quota: Resets every Monday at 00:00:00 (UTC+08:00).

    3.   Monthly quota: Resets at 00:00:00 (UTC+08:00) on your subscription renewal date each month.

## **Quick start**

### **Step 1: Subscribe to a Coding plan**

Go to the [Coding Plan page](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=globalset#/efm/coding_plan), select a plan based on your needs, and complete the subscription process.

You can subscribe directly with your Alibaba Cloud account. If you are a RAM user, your Alibaba Cloud account owner must grant you the necessary permissions before you can subscribe.

**Authorize a RAM user**

1.   **Add a user:** Log on to Alibaba Cloud Model Studio with your Alibaba Cloud account. Go to the [Permissions](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=app#/authority) page of your target workspace. Click **Add User**, specify a username for the RAM user, and click **Confirm**.![Image 3: image](https://help-static-aliyun-doc.aliyuncs.com/assets/img/en-US/9842172771/p1057319.png)

2.   **Grant permissions:** Find the user and click **Permissions** in the Actions column. Select the **Administrator** role and click **Confirm** to complete the authorization.![Image 4: image](https://help-static-aliyun-doc.aliyuncs.com/assets/img/en-US/9842172771/p1057328.png)

### **Step 2: Get plan-specific API key and base URL**

You must use the plan-specific API key and base URL to ensure usage is correctly deducted from your plan's quota.

*   **API key**: On the [Coding Plan page](https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=globalset#/efm/coding_plan), get your Coding Plan-specific API key (in the format `sk-sp-xxxxx`).

*   **Base URL**: Configure one of the following base URLs in your AI tool. The URL to use depends on the tool. For specific instructions, refer to the documentation for your AI tool.

    *   **OpenAI-compatible protocol**: `https://coding-intl.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/v1`

    *   **Anthropic-compatible protocol**: `https://coding-intl.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic`

**Note**

The API key and base URL for a Coding Plan are different from the API key (which starts with `sk-xxxxx`) and base URL (for example, `https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/xxxxxx`) for the pay-as-you-go service in Model Studio. Do not use them interchangeably.

### **Step 3: Integrate with an AI tool**

[**OpenClaw**Open-source, self-hosted personal AI assistant](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/openclaw-coding-plan)

[**OpenCode**Open-source AI programming agent tool](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/opencode-coding-plan)

[**Claude Code**AI terminal coding assistant that supports natural language programming](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/claude-code-coding-plan)

[**Cline**VS Code extension for intelligent code completion and debugging](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/cline-coding-plan)

[**Cursor**AI-native code editor](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/cursor-coding-plan)

[**Qwen Code**Open-source command-line AI tool optimized for Qwen3-Coder](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/qwen-code-coding-plan)

[**Kilo Code**IDE extension for efficient coding](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/kilo-code-coding-plan)

[**Kilo CLI**Lightweight, high-performance command-line programming tool](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/kilo-cli-coding-plan)

[**Codex**Command-line programming tool from OpenAI](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/codex-coding-plan)

For information about support for other tools, such as IDEs, see [Other Tools](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/other-tools-coding-plan).

## **Before you subscribe**

The Coding Plan service is **non-refundable**. Before you subscribe, please be aware of the following important terms:

1.   **Prohibition of API calls**: This plan is intended exclusively for interactive use within programming tools such as Claude Code and OpenClaw. Do not use the plan's API key for automated scripts, custom application backends, or any non-interactive, batch-calling scenarios. **Using the API key outside the permitted scope is a violation that may result in subscription suspension or API key revocation.**

2.   **Account usage policy**: The plan is for the exclusive use of the subscriber and must not be shared. Account sharing may lead to restrictions on your subscription benefits.

## FAQ

### Unexpected charges with a Coding Plan

This issue occurs when you use the general Model Studio API key and base URL instead of the ones specific to your Coding Plan. This usage is billed on a pay-as-you-go basis, resulting in extra charges. To resolve this, switch to the exclusive Coding Plan API key (which starts with `sk-sp-`) and the exclusive base URL (which contains `coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com`). For configuration instructions, see [Get your plan-specific API key and base URL](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/coding-plan#2531c37fd64f9).

For more questions, refer to the [FAQ](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/coding-plan-faq).
